summary: Completed comprehensive testing of movie recommender system. Backend APIs working perfectly (35/35 tests passed). Frontend functionality working well with minor AI timeout issue.

integration_issues.issue: AI response may timeout on frontend due to long processing time

passed_tests: All home categories (trending, popular, top_rated, now_playing, upcoming)
Search functionality with multiple query types
Movie details with complete data structure
Frontend home page with hero section
Search page navigation and results display
Movie detail page navigation and content
Mood Matcher page UI and input handling
action_item_for_main_agent: Consider adding frontend timeout handling for AI mood matching to improve user experience during long AI response times
